/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/ColorPalette.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/CylinderType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/ArrowType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/PatchCapType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/PatchConeType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/PatchPlacement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/Particle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/ParticleType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/ParticleSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/RodType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/ScreenshotSupport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/SimulationBox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/SphereType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/TrajectoryReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvt.dir/src/ViewerSupport.cpp.o -o cvt  /home/frank/Visualization/New/Vis2/third_party/bgfx/.build/linux64_gcc/bin/libbgfxRelease.a /home/frank/Visualization/New/Vis2/third_party/bgfx/.build/linux64_gcc/bin/libbimgRelease.a /home/frank/Visualization/New/Vis2/third_party/bgfx/.build/linux64_gcc/bin/libbxRelease.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3
